text.content:
Injuries • Thunder • Ear-ringer

Injury Card

Ear-ringer

After a particularly loud thunderous boom, your ears start ringing incessantly. You find it hard to focus as the sound drowns out everything around you, making communication a challenge.

Thunder Blast
Treatment

Resting in a quiet area for a few hours can alleviate the ringing. Alternatively, a caster could attempt to dispel the temporary deafness.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • journaltype: injury

  • category: Thunder

  • odds: 50

  • foldername: Injuries

  • title: Ear-ringer

  • imagetitle: Thunder Blast

  • image: icons/magic/air/air-wave-gust-blue.webp

  • description: After a particularly loud thunderous boom, your ears start ringing incessantly. You find it hard to focus as the sound drowns out everything around you, making communication a challenge.

  • treatment: Resting in a quiet area for a few hours can alleviate the ringing. Alternatively, a caster could attempt to dispel the temporary deafness.

  • severity: Minor

  • damage: 2

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Thunder Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened

Injuries • Thunder • Ear-ringing Shockwave

Injury Card

Ear-ringing Shockwave

During a fierce thunderous clash, you found yourself too close to a deafening blast of sound. The intense pressure rattled your eardrums, leaving your hearing muddled and distant.

Sound Blast Echo
Treatment

To soothe your ears, you must rest in a quiet environment and avoid exposure to loud noises.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • odds: 20

  • treatment: To soothe your ears, you must rest in a quiet environment and avoid exposure to loud noises.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 6

  • duration: 600

  • action: Apply the Thunder Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened

Injuries • Thunder • Ear-shattering Boom

Injury Card

Ear-shattering Boom

During a powerful thunderous strike, your ears are bombarded with a resonating boom that seems to linger. You can now hear everything as if you're underwater, with distant echoes distorting sounds around you. The louder the noise, the more painful the reverberation.

Tinnitus Echo
Treatment

Visit a skilled healer who can help recalibrate your inner ear balance, or endure the ringing until it fades naturally.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Thunder

  • odds: 10

  • treatment: Visit a skilled healer who can help recalibrate your inner ear balance, or endure the ringing until it fades naturally.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 7

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Thunder Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened

Injuries • Thunder • Eardrum Rupture

Injury Card

Eardrum Rupture

After being caught in a thunderous clap, your eardrums shatter, leaving you with muffled hearing and a tendency to yell everything you say. The world feels oddly silent; even the loudest noises dim in comparison to the constant ringing in your ears.

Sonic Boom Echo
Treatment

Seek out a skilled bard or healer to cast a mending spell on your ears. Avoid sudden loud noises to prevent further damage.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 6 Hit Points

  • Duration: 50

  • Status Effect: Deafened

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Thunder

  • odds: 25

  • treatment: Seek out a skilled bard or healer to cast a mending spell on your ears. Avoid sudden loud noises to prevent further damage.

  • severity: Moderate

  • damage: 6

  • duration: 300

  • action: Apply the Thunder Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened

Injuries • Thunder • Electric Shockwave

Injury Card

Electric Shockwave

Hit by a powerful burst of electricity, your muscles twitch uncontrollably and your nerves feel on edge.

Zapped
Treatment

Rest and avoid contact with water to prevent further electric surges.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 10 Hit Points

  • Duration: 600

  • Status Effect: Twitching

Injuries • Thunder • Lightning Tickles

Injury Card

Lightning Tickles

A bolt of lightning grazes your skin, leaving a tingling sensation and making it hard to hold onto things.

Electric Sensation
Treatment

Massage the affected area to reduce the tingling sensation.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 2 Hit Points

  • Duration: 300

  • Status Effect: none

Injuries • Thunder • Roaring Thunderclap

Injury Card

Roaring Thunderclap

Caught in the epicenter of a deafening thunderclap, your very essence quivers in response to the overwhelming force. Your vision blurs, and even the slightest sound feels like a hammer blow.

Cacophonous Boom
Treatment

Only the most skilled of healers can mend the internal damage caused by the thunderclap. Resting in complete silence may slowly restore your senses.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Major

  • Damage: 11 Hit Points

  • Duration: Permanent

  • Status Effect: Deafened, Blind

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

  • category: Thunder

  • odds: 10

  • treatment: Only the most skilled of healers can mend the internal damage caused by the thunderclap. Resting in complete silence may slowly restore your senses.

  • severity: Major

  • damage: 11

  • action: Apply the Thunder Injury

  • statuseffect: Deafened, Blind

Injuries • Thunder • Static Shock

Injury Card

Static Shock

A sudden jolt of electric energy courses through your body as if you've been struck by a lightning rod. Your muscles twitch uncontrollably, making precise movements a challenge.

Electric Discharge
Treatment

Resting and grounding yourself by touching something conductive for a few hours can help dissipate the electric charge. A caster may also attempt to restore your nerve control.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Minor

  • Damage: 3 Hit Points

  • Duration: 40

  • Status Effect: Paralyzed

Metadata

The metadata is used to generate the Injury in the chat window. Poorly formatted metadata will result in broken or nonfunctional injuries.

Injuries • Thunder • Thunderous Migraine

Injury Card

Thunderous Migraine

The booming thunder overhead triggers a debilitating headache that makes focusing on tasks a challenge.

Brainstorm
Treatment

Resting in a quiet and dark environment to ease the headache.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 450

  • Status Effect: Headache

Injuries • Thunder • Thunderstruck

Injury Card

Thunderstruck

A direct hit from a powerful bolt of lightning leaves you feeling like you've danced with the storm itself. Your body tingles with residual electricity, and your movements are sluggish.

Storm's Fury
Treatment

Seeking shelter from further electrical discharges and resting for an extended period can help alleviate the effects. A skilled healer might be able to accelerate your recovery.

Details

  • Category: Thunder

  • Severity: Moderate

  • Damage: 7 Hit Points

  • Duration: 100

  • Status Effect: none
